title: PIIFilter Detection Recall Benchmark Report (full set)

example_results.text_preview: Hi, I'm Alice Johnson from Acme Corp. Email: alice@acme.com Phone: +1-555-123-45
Our office is at 350 Fifth Avenue, New York, NY 10118
Paris has a population of over 2 million people and is the capital of France.
My bank account is 123456789012 and my IBAN is DE89 3704 0044 0532 0130 00
My passport is AB1234567 and my SSN is 987-65-4321
The server IP is 192.168.1.100 and the backup is 10.0.0.5

SSH key: -----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
ABC123...
-----END OPENSSH PRIVATE
Domain: google.com and api.github.com and my-site.internal
Project: Project Phoenix is our codename for the new ERP rollout.
Our customer Jane Smith from Widgets Inc. wants her data removed.
Employee Bob Marley from accounting needs VPN access to 10.88.0.1
Contact me at bob.smith@example.org or call +44 20 7946 0958 for the project Vul
The best customer we have is Clara Oswald and she works at Data Corp.
Please add employee David Tennant to the access list for project Galactic.
Visit us at 10 Downing Street, London, SW1A 2AA
Located in Berlin, Germany - our HQ is at Unter den Linden 1, 10117 Berlin
Send to: maria.garcia@co.jp | CC: info@company.co.uk | BCC: devops@internal.corp

SSH config: -----BEGIN EC PRIVATE KEY-----
MHcCAQEEIIxYb...
-----END EC PRIVATE
Coordinates: 48.8566 N, 2.3522 E is the center of Paris
Passport: CD987654 and also passport XY123456
Our CEO Bob Smith (bob@company.com) approved the merger.
The employee named John (employee John) can access server 10.0.0.50
Project Nebula starts Q1 and Project Orion is in maintenance mode.
Home address: 123 Maple Drive, Springfield, IL 62704, USA
Person: Dr. Sarah Chen works at Microsoft Research in Redmond
Countries: Canada, Australia, Japan, Brazil, India, Egypt
SSN: 111-22-3333 is used as the sample number

SSH key: -----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
Proc-Type: 4,ENCRYPTED
-----END RSA PRI

SSH: -----BEGIN DSA PRIVATE KEY-----
MIIBvAIB...
-----END DSA PRIVATE KEY-----
Domain: example.internal and mysql.corp.local and api.staging.private
Employee: Rose Tyler (rose@torchwood.xyz), employee: Jack Harkness (jack@torchwo
Contact person: Donna Noble (donna@temp-services.co.uk). Project Bad Wolf is GO.
City: The population of Mumbai is over 20 million.
The server at 10.0.0.1 handles requests from 192.168.1.50 to 172.16.0.10
GPS: lat: 55.7558, lng: 37.6173 (Moscow) and lat: 59.9343, lng: 30.3351 (SPB)
Employee: Mickey Smith (mickey@ctos.earth) for project Last Centurion
Customer: River Song (river@library.silence) - project Impossible Astronaut
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Meeting at 2 PM tomorrow in the conference room B.
The price of milk is $3.50 at the local grocery store.
Please review the quarterly report before Friday.
The server maintenance is scheduled for this weekend.
User typed a phone-like number: 123-456-7890 but this is not a real phone.
My street is 123 Main Street, not 123 Main St.
Version 3.1.4 is the latest release of the software package.
The year 2025 will be important for our company growth.
Please use ticket number TKT-12345 for the bug report.
What does a@b or x@y mean? These arent real emails - short local parts.
The value 555-1212 is often used in TV shows as a fake number.
The address is at 42 Wallaby Way, Sydney (famous from Finding Nemo).
User 192.168.x.x is a common notation for private networks.
Unicode PII: 联系用户张伟，邮箱是zhangwei@example.cn，电话+86 138-0013-8000
Arabic: اتصل بـ أحمد على ahmed@example.sa أو +966 55 123 4567
Russian: Иван Иванов, email: ivan@example.ru, тел: +7 495 123-45-67
Japanese: 田中太郎のメールはtanaka@example.jp、電話は+81 90-1234-5678
Greek: O Γιώργος έχει email: giorgos@example.gr
mixed RTL/LTR: my email is john@doe.com and my phone is +972 50 123 4567 שלום
Base64 encoded email: dGVzdEBleGFtcGxlLmNvbQ== looks like a token but its an ema
Partially redacted: My credit card is ****-****-****-1111 and SSN is ***-**-6789
Redacted phone: XXX-XXX-7890 and email: xxxx@domain.com
Person: James researcher published his findings in Nature at London University.
SSN-like: 987654321 is just a long number, not an SSN (no dashes).
Phone-like: 5552368 is short sequence, not enough digits for phone.
Email-like: admin@localhost is technically valid but internal-only.
Domain: 123 is not a valid domain name by itself.
Path: tmp/foo/bar is relative, not absolute, so not a FILE_PATH.
Base64 encoded SSN: MTIzLTQ1LTY3ODk= in base64, detectors should not decode this
Contact: jоhn@example.com (Cyrillic о instead of Latin o)
CSS: '. alice@acme.com' is a quoted email
